perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun and wearing a black sweatshirt holds a pink TKLAB collagen drink sachet and box, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) Transitions between different scenes showing her drinking the product: at home, in a studio, and in an office. A split-screen comparison shows 'Before' and 'After' shots of her face, highlighting improved skin radiance. (3) The woman is in an office setting with audio equipment, handing out collagen sachets to three female colleagues who react happily. (4) The video ends with her dancing and waving goodbye to her colleagues as they finish work.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop BGM starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a fast, high-pitched, and excited tone, introducing the product benefits. (2) The music continues at a steady tempo. The sound of a sachet being opened and a sipping sound (SFX) are audible as she demonstrates drinking. (3) Ambient office noise and the voices of multiple women laughing and chatting are heard as she distributes the product. (4) The music builds up for the outro as multiple voices shout 'Bye bye' and laugh before fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '沒想到效果這麼好' (Didn't expect the effect to be so good) - Surprised and happy tone. (2) '喝10天就感覺到氣色更好' (Felt better complexion after drinking for 10 days) - Informative tone. (3) 'Before' and 'After' - Comparative functional text. (4) 'TKLAB DOUBLE 特級膠原飲' (TKLAB Double Super Collagen Drink) and '6000mg' - Product details. (5) '喝起來就像莓果果汁，酸甜清爽' (Tastes like berry juice, sweet and sour and refreshing) - Sensory description. (6) '10天內就讓你氣色好狀態好' (Good complexion and state within 10 days) - Promotional hook. (7) '以後大家直播都不用開美肌' (No need for beauty filters in live streams anymore) - Humorous and confident hook. (8) '實習生下班' (Intern off work) - Scene context.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Personal hook -> Before/After evidence -> Product feature explanation -> Social sharing with colleagues -> Playful outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator throughout, plus 3 female colleagues in the office scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair styled in a high bun, wearing a black oversized sweatshirt and later a light-colored t-shirt. She is very expressive and energetic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom/living area with figurines and posters; a studio with tripods and professional lighting; and an office with computers, audio mixing boards, and white curtains.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, very clear and even.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration/Evidence -> Technical Details -> Social Validation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic product endorsement for TKLAB Super Collagen Drink. It aims to convince viewers of the product's immediate efficacy (the 10-day claim) and pleasant taste by showing a personal transformation, detailing the high collagen content (6000mg), and demonstrating its popularity among office colleagues. The ultimate goal is to drive sales by framing the product as a lifestyle essential that replaces the need for beauty filters.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Holding the product box and sachet directly to camera, showing 'Before/After' results, mentioning specific product names and ingredients, and handing it to others as a recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'bestie' style recommendation combined with fast-paced editing and variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of an office environment and the 'intern' label makes the high-end beauty claim more relatable to a working-class or student demographic. The emphasis on 'no beauty filter needed' taps into current social media trends regarding skin authenticity.
